content.problemStatement:
You are given two integers NNN and XXX. Your task is to construct a permutation PPP of {1,2,‚Ä¶,N}\{1, 2, \ldots, N\}{1,2,‚Ä¶,N} which satisfies the following conditions:


P1=XP_1 = XP1‚Äã=X
Let DDD be the difference array of PPP, i.e, DDD is an array of length N‚àí1N-1N‚àí1 such that Di=Pi+1‚àíPiD_i = P_{i+1} - P_iDi‚Äã=Pi+1‚Äã‚àíPi‚Äã for 1‚â§i<N1 \leq i \lt N1‚â§i<N.

The array DDD should be a palindrome.
If there are multiple solutions, you may print any of them.

If there's no solution, output ‚àí1-1‚àí1 instead.


Input Format

The first line of input contains a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of a single line containing two space-separated integers NNN and XXX.


Output Format

For each test case, output NNN space-separated integers representing the permutation PPP. If there's no solution, output ‚àí1-1‚àí1 instead.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 4‚ãÖ1054 \cdot 10^54‚ãÖ105.

Test case 222: N=3N = 3N=3 and X=1X = 1X=1. Consider P=[1,2,3]P = [1, 2, 3]P=[1,2,3].

P1=1=XP_1 = 1 = XP1‚Äã=1=X
D=[1,1]D = [1, 1]D=[1,1] is a palindrome.

Test case 333: N=4N = 4N=4 and X=3X = 3X=3. Consider P=[3,1,4,2]P = [3, 1, 4, 2]P=[3,1,4,2].

P1=3=XP_1 = 3 = XP1‚Äã=3=X
D=[‚àí2,3,‚àí2]D = [-2, 3, -2]D=[‚àí2,3,‚àí2] is a palindrome.
